positive: A stylish, stylized illustration of a geometric forest pathway winding through oversized bioluminescent flora and abstract crystal formations. The central path should be framed by towering, stylized plants with deep indigo and electric teal petals. Incorporate repeating natural geometric patterns (like mandalas or honeycomb structures) subtly into the background foliage and crystals. The style should be a modern graphic novel aesthetic, combining Art Deco symmetry with organic line work. Use high contrast for strong silhouettes, with the main light source emanating from the glowing flora, casting dramatic, vibrant shadows. Color palette: sapphire blue, emerald green, indigo, and pops of bright neon yellow/cyan. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for apparel transfer print. Clean, vector-like outlines.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, artifact, signature, watermark, logo, text, dirty, ugly, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, grain
